name: No Sugar Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients in a bowl until smooth.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
3. Slice the apples into thin pieces.
4. Place the slices in an uncooked pie crust.
5. Pour the mixture over the apples.
6. Cover with the top pie crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
8. Optionally, sprinkle the apples with one package of Sweet and Low before baking.
Note: The crust can be omitted to save calories. Simply pour the mixture into a pie pan.
